jobs.title: Sous Chef
jobs.description: An exciting opportunity for an experienced Sous Chef to join a busy 4-star hotel kitchen. You will support the Head Chef in managing a brigade of 8, maintaining high standards of food preparation and presentation.

jobs.title: Hotel Receptionist
jobs.description: Join a vibrant hotel team as Front Desk Receptionist. You will be the first point of contact for guests, handling check-ins, reservations, and delivering excellent customer service.

jobs.title: Banqueting Waiter
jobs.description: Banqueting waiters needed for large events at a prestigious venue. Flexible shifts available including weekends.

jobs.title: Chef de Partie
jobs.description: Chef de Partie required for a popular gastro pub group in Leeds. Experience in a similar role essential.

jobs.title: Bar Supervisor
jobs.description: Bar Supervisor needed for a trendy cocktail bar in central London. Part-time evenings and weekends.

jobs.title: Events Coordinator
jobs.description: Events Coordinator needed for a luxury event management company. You will oversee end-to-end event delivery for corporate clients.

jobs.title: Commis Chef
jobs.description: Enthusiastic Commis Chef wanted to join an award-winning restaurant in Bristol. Excellent training and progression opportunities.

jobs.title: Front of House Manager
jobs.description: Front of House Manager required for a high-profile fine dining restaurant in London. Must have previous management experience.

jobs.title: Restaurant Manager
jobs.description: Restaurant Manager for a growing casual dining brand in Liverpool city centre.

jobs.title: Warehouse Operative
jobs.description: Warehouse operatives needed for a large distribution centre in Coventry. Day and night shifts available.

jobs.title: Forklift Driver
jobs.description: Counterbalance forklift drivers required for a busy logistics warehouse. Valid RTITB/ITSSAR licence required.

jobs.title: Kitchen Porter
jobs.description: Kitchen porters required for a hotel catering operation in Manchester. Flexible shift patterns.

jobs.title: Customer Service Advisor
jobs.description: Customer Service Advisors needed for a busy contact centre in Sheffield. Excellent communication skills required.

jobs.title: HGV Driver Class 2
jobs.description: Class 2 HGV drivers required for multi-drop deliveries across Yorkshire. CPC and valid tacho card essential.

jobs.title: Catering Assistant
jobs.description: Catering assistants needed for a large healthcare catering contract in London.

jobs.title: Office Administrator
jobs.description: Office Administrator required for a financial services firm in central London. Proficiency in MS Office essential.

jobs.title: HR Coordinator
jobs.description: HR Coordinator for a 6-month contract supporting a busy HR team during a period of growth.

jobs.title: Logistics Coordinator
jobs.description: Logistics Coordinator to manage inbound and outbound shipments for a manufacturing client in Birmingham.

jobs.title: Executive Chef
jobs.description: Executive Chef for a 5-star hotel in Edinburgh. You will lead a team of 20 chefs across multiple dining outlets.

jobs.title: Food & Beverage Manager
jobs.description: F&B Manager for a premium hotel group overseeing all food and beverage operations across multiple venues.

jobs.title: Events Manager
jobs.description: Events Manager for a prestigious London venue. Experience in large-scale corporate and private events essential.

jobs.title: Packer
jobs.description: Packers required for an FMCG warehouse in Corby. Immediate starts available. Day and night shifts.

jobs.title: Machine Operator
jobs.description: Machine Operators needed for food manufacturing facility in Coventry. Experience operating production machinery preferred.

jobs.title: IT Support Technician
jobs.description: IT Support Technician for a 3-month contract at a financial services company. 1st/2nd line support experience required.
